name: Beef Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven over medium heat, brown the roasts in oil; drain.
2. Add water, onion, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper to the pot. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat. Cover and simmer for 2-2 1/2 hours or until the meat is tender. Remove the roasts and let them cool.
4. Remove the meat from the bones and cut into bite-size pieces. Skim any fat from the pan juices.
5. Add the meat back to the pot and bring it to a boil, then reduce the heat.
6. Simmer uncovered for 30 minutes.
7. Combine flour with cold water in a separate bowl until well mixed.
8. Stir the flour mixture into the beef. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly.
9. Add hot pepper sauce.
10. Spoon the filling down the center of warmed tortillas. Fold the top and bottom of the tortilla over the filling and roll up.
11. Serve with shredded cheddar cheese, sour cream, and salsa.
